prompt: A cinematic third-person action RPG gameplay screenshot set in Macau in 1995, viewed from behind a lone male protagonist walking down the center of a crowded wet street at night. The scene is dense with neon signage in Chinese characters, casino signs, jewelry shops, banks, and old mid-rise buildings packed tightly on both sides, with a glowing landmark tower in the distance shaped like a giant illuminated lotus or stylized casino facade. The main character is centered in the frame, wearing a dark leather jacket and jeans, seen from the back, holding a glowing blue energy sword in his right hand and a second short weapon or baton in the left. The street is lined with 6 clearly visible cars, including vintage sedans and 2 taxi cabs, while many pedestrians stand on sidewalks and spill into the street, creating a busy urban nightlife atmosphere. The pavement is rain-slick and highly reflective, mirroring the red, blue, gold, and green neon lights for a moody cyberpunk-meets-1990s crime-drama look. Add a complete in-game HUD overlay: top left has a circular character portrait, the player name Mayar, a red health bar reading 1230 / 1930, a blue energy bar reading 508 / 1160, and a small green status icon; top right has a circular minimap and the location text MACAU CHRONICLES: 1995; bottom left has a semi-transparent chat box with multiple lines of player chat text; bottom right has 6 numbered ability icons in a hotbar, with blue sword-slash skills, a silhouette movement skill, a hand-power icon, a golden weapon skill, and a glowing ultimate icon. Highly detailed, photorealistic game-engine rendering, centered composition, dramatic atmospheric lighting, realistic crowd scale, immersive AAA open-world RPG interface, nostalgic 1990s East Asian street mood with subtle sci-fi fantasy elements.
